warps.notes: Exit south — returns to Blackthorn City (warp 8 in city, the Dragon's Den cave mouth tile)
Internal loop warp — used for continuity, points back into this floor
Descend to B1F — the water entry point; player must use Surf to traverse B1F

notes: Map is 10 tiles wide x 18 tiles tall (5x9 blocks).
1F is a narrow cave antechamber — essentially an entrance vestibule connecting Blackthorn City above to B1F below.
The Blackthorn City exit warp is at (3,5) — cave mouth leading out south to the city.
Stairway/water descent to B1F is at tile (5,15).
There are no wild encounters, NPCs, trainers, or items on this floor.
No HMs are required to traverse 1F itself; Surf is needed once in B1F.
The cave uses darkness / CAVE environment; Flash or internal lighting via PALETTE_NITE.

fishing.notes: FISHGROUP_DRATINI assigned in maps.asm but no water tiles exist on 1F — fishing is not possible here.

notes: Dragon's Den 1F is a compact cave vestibule with no wild encounters, NPCs, or items. It is accessed from Blackthorn City's northern shoreline (cave mouth at city warp_id 8). The floor's sole function is to funnel the player downward to B1F. Access is initially blocked by a Gramps NPC standing outside in Blackthorn City (EVENT_BLACKTHORN_CITY_GRAMPS_BLOCKS_DRAGONS_DEN) until Clair sends the player here after her gym battle. After the Dragon Shrine quiz and Clair granting the Rising Badge, the den is freely accessible.
